title: T-025 — Stock move service (transfer/issue/return/quarantine) (WH §8.1)
prompt:
# T-025 — Stock move service (transfer/issue/return/quarantine) (WH §8.1)

PRD: docs/prd/05-WAREHOUSE-PRD.md §8.1
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Implement `createStockMove` service covering 6 non-receipt move types. Validates LP state, writes stock_moves, updates LP.location_id, handles quarantine (suggests location, does NOT auto-move per D18).

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/stock-move.ts`: function `createStockMove({lp_id, move_type, from_location_id, to_location_id, quantity, catch_weight_kg, reason_code, reason_text, reference_type, reference_id})`.
2. Validation: LP.status ∈ ('available','reserved'); to_location active; partial moves trigger split via T-026 cascade; reason_code mandatory for adjustment/quarantine/return (V-WH-MOV-005).
3. Quarantine: writes move row but does NOT auto-move — operator confirms physical move per D18.
4. Atomic transaction; emit outbox `lp.moved` or specific event per move_type.

## Files
- apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/stock-move.ts [create]
- apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/__tests__/stock-move.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given an `available` LP, when transferred to a new location, then stock_moves row inserted with from/to and LP.location_id updated.
2. Given a quarantine move call, when invoked, then a stock_moves row is inserted with move_type='quarantine' BUT LP.location_id is unchanged (per D18 — operator must explicitly move).
3. Given an adjustment without reason_code, when called, then service rejects with V-WH-MOV-005.
4. Given to_location is inactive, when called, then service rejects with V-WH-MOV-003.

## Test strategy
- RED: `apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/__tests__/stock-move.test.ts` asserting all 6 move types, reason gate, quarantine no-auto-move, location-active check.
- Run `pnpm --filter web test stock-move`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not auto-move on quarantine (D18 baseline).
- Do not skip reason_code for adjustment/quarantine/return.
- Do not allow moves on consumed/shipped/blocked LPs.

## Dependencies
- T-006
- T-002
